note: FOMC dates from Federal Reserve calendar (federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm). CPI/jobs from BLS release schedule. Earnings estimated from historical reporting patterns. Regime context as of 2026-07-08: market prices ~2/3 odds of a HIKE by September (hawkish June dots, strong jobs); the Sep 15-16 FOMC is the live decision for the gold/metals hedge trigger framework in data/intelligence/metals-hedge-state.json.

events.label: CPI May 2026
events.detail: Core CPI YoY, prior 2.7%

events.label: FOMC Decision
events.detail: Jun 17–18 meeting. Held; dots turned hawkish — 9 members project at least one 2026 hike

events.label: PCE May 2026
events.detail: Fed's preferred inflation gauge. Prior core 2.6% YoY

events.label: NFP Jun 2026
events.detail: Strong print — spiked Sep hike odds, gold sold off, dollar rallied

events.label: CPI Jun 2026
events.detail: BLS 8:30am ET. First chance to deflate Sep hike odds — metals trigger event

events.detail: Financial sector earnings season opens

events.label: Tesla Q2
events.detail: TSLA — delivery volumes, margin, EV demand signal

events.label: FOMC Decision
events.detail: Jul 28–29 meeting. Market prices ~73% hold; statement language on hike path is the read

events.label: Alphabet / Meta Q2
events.detail: GOOGL + META — ad market health, AI monetisation

events.detail: First estimate of Q2 real GDP growth

events.detail: AAPL + AMZN — consumer spend, cloud, iPhone cycle

events.label: PCE Jun 2026

events.label: NFP Jul 2026
events.detail: July payrolls. Fastest lever on Sep hike odds — metals trigger event

events.detail: July inflation. Seasonal shelter effects

events.label: Navan Q2 FY27

events.detail: NVDA — data-centre demand, Blackwell ramp, guidance

events.label: PCE Jul 2026
events.detail: July PCE ahead of September FOMC

events.detail: August payrolls. Key input to Sep FOMC decision

events.label: CPI Aug 2026
events.detail: August CPI. Final major inflation read before Sep FOMC

events.label: FOMC Decision + SEP
events.detail: Sep 15–16 meeting, new dot plot. LIVE HIKE DECISION (~2/3 priced). Historically first-hike week has marked metals bottoms (Dec 2015 analog)

events.label: CPI Sep 2026
events.detail: Approximate BLS schedule. September inflation

events.label: FOMC Decision
events.detail: Oct 27–28 meeting — three business days before midterms; Fed historically avoids acting this close to an election

events.label: US Midterm Elections
events.detail: Since 1962 S&P 500 never negative in the 12 months after midterms (avg +12-16%). Pre-election Sep/Oct is the historical uncertainty low, not post-election

events.label: NFP Oct 2026
events.detail: October payrolls. Approximate BLS schedule

events.label: FOMC Decision
events.detail: Dec 8–9 meeting. If economy stays hot, second hike window; if hiked in Sep and data softened, pause confirms metals bottom
